items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes across Middle East for second day in a row
items.summary: Iran says it responded to US strikes by targeting American assets in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain, which reported damage to its capital city overnight.

items.title: Trump says 'I love the inflation' as US prices rise at fastest rate in three years
items.summary: The US president later said he had meant that he actually loved that inflation was not higher.

items.title: The furious dispute over what caused Air India flight 171 to crash
items.summary: The final conclusions of the investigation have yet to be published, although more could become apparent in the coming days.

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美軍阿曼灣再射飛彈！轟為伊朗運油輪 荷姆茲海峽本週第3轟
items.summary: 美國中央司令部（CENTCOM）證實，美軍今（11）日在阿曼灣攻擊了一艘替伊朗運送石油的油輪「賈爾維爾號」（Jalveer）。這是美軍本週在荷姆茲海峽周遭襲擊的第3艘船隻。  ...…

items.title: 瀕臨貿易戰！歐盟對中祭防堵出口措施  北京突取消2場外交會議
items.summary: 由於中國對歐洲出口激增，令歐盟大感不滿，近期祭出多項防堵措施，促使中國採取反制行動。英國《金融時報》報導，北京當局近日突然取消原訂6月在北京舉行的2場重要外交會議，引發外界關注...…

items.title: 美駐緬甸外交官竟命喪旅館 泰籍女嫌抓到了
items.summary: 美國國務院證實，派駐緬甸仰光的美國外交官在旅館身亡，緬甸警方朝「謀殺案」方向偵辦，逮捕扣押涉案泰國籍女子。  據《紐約郵報》報導，美國國務院日前證實，派駐緬甸仰光大使館的美國...…
